title: MaudeNarrativeExtractorOutput
description: Output schema for skills/maude-narrative-extractor v1.0.0 (implements DR-03)

maude_report_id.description: Unique MAUDE MDR identifier; matches the input id

extraction_ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when extraction completed

failure_mode.description: Short noun phrase describing the proximate failure, or null if not extractable

ai_related_flag.description: true/false/null — null means insufficient evidence to determine

ai_related_rationale.description: Must always be populated, even when ai_related_flag is null

confidence_score.description: Self-assessed extraction confidence. Capped at 0.95 — never claim certainty.

narrative_excerpt.description: First 500 characters of combined preprocessed narrative for traceability

narrative_truncated.description: True if the input narrative was truncated to fit context window

extraction_notes.description: Caveats, ambiguities, or cross-referencing notes. null if nothing notable.
